title: Publication
content:
Publication

Publication

IICCCS aims to collate your works into a book of abstracts that will meet scientific-academic standards. We intend to publish the book by

August 2022

. To this end, IICCCS proposes researchers the following deadlines:

The deadline for sending the updated version of your conference abstracts is

. If you would like to submit your papers for consideration, the deadline for sending extended abstracts is

1 October 2021

.

Paylaş
